info.name: Project Management System API
info.description:
Collection lengkap untuk testing Project Management System API

**Setup:**
1. Import collection ini
2. Set variable `baseUrl` = `http://localhost:3000`
3. Jalankan request **Login** terlebih dahulu — token akan otomatis tersimpan

response.name: 400 Bad Request – Validasi gagal
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Validation failed","errors":[{"field":"email","message":"Invalid email format"},{"field":"password","message":"Password must be at least 8 characters"}]}

response.name: 429 Too Many Requests - Terlalu banyak percobaan registrasi
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Terlalu banyak permintaan registrasi. Coba lagi dalam 1 jam.","statusCode":429}

response.name: 429 Too Many Requests - Terlalu banyak percobaan login
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Terlalu banyak percobaan login. Coba lagi dalam 15 menit.","statusCode":429}

response.name: 201 Created – Project berhasil dibuat
response.body: {"success":true,"message":"Project created successfully","data":{"id":5,"name":"Project Alpha","description":"Proyek pertama untuk testing RBAC dan caching","status":"active","created_by":1,"created_at":"2026-05-08T10:00:00.000Z"}}

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Setup Infrastructure",
  "description": "Siapkan server, database, dan semua dependensi",
  "project_id": {{projectId}},
  "priority": "high",
  "status": "open",
  "assigned_to": 1,
  "due_date": "2026-06-01T17:00:00.000Z"
}

response.name: 201 Created – Task berhasil dibuat
response.body: {"success":true,"message":"Task created successfully","data":{"id":20,"title":"Setup Infrastructure","description":"Siapkan server, database, dan semua dependensi","project_id":1,"parent_task_id":null,"priority":"high","status":"open","assigned_to":1,"due_date":"2026-06-01T17:00:00.000Z","created_at":"2026-05-08T10:00:00.000Z"}}

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Install Docker",
  "description": "Install dan konfigurasi Docker di server",
  "project_id": {{projectId}},
  "parent_task_id": {{taskId}},
  "priority": "medium",
  "status": "open",
  "assigned_to": 1,
  "due_date": "2026-05-20T17:00:00.000Z"
}

{
  "title": "Configure Docker Network",
  "description": "Setup bridge network untuk komunikasi antar container",
  "project_id": {{projectId}},
  "parent_task_id": {{taskId}},
  "priority": "low",
  "status": "open",
  "assigned_to": 1,

response.name: 400 Bad Request – Status tidak valid
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Validation failed","errors":[{"field":"status","message":"Invalid status. Must be: open, working, review, closed, overdue"}]}

response.name: 403 Forbidden – Bukan pemilik task
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Access denied. You can only update tasks assigned to you"}

response.name: 403 Forbidden – Akses ditolak
response.body: {"success":false,"message":"Access denied. You can only update tasks assigned to you"}

response.name: 403 Forbidden – Manager tidak bisa buat project
403 Forbidden – Manager tidak bisa lihat semua user
403 Forbidden – Staff tidak bisa buat task

item.name: [Staff] Update Task assigned ke dia ✅ Harus berhasil
